name: AHLSTROM-MUNKSJOE OYJ
summary: Ahlstrom-Munksjö Oyj is a global provider of sustainable and innovative fiber-based solutions. The company develops, manufactures and supplies a wide range of specialty papers and release liners and filter materials, with headquarters in Helsinki, Finland. Ahlstrom-Munksjö's business model centers on providing value-added products to various industries including food, healthcare, and construction
